untranslatable_reason: Inverted cup and handle pattern requires multi-bar shape recognition (cup formation over ~20 bars, handle formation over ~5 bars) which cannot be expressed as single-bar indicator conditions. The pattern inherently requires pattern matching logic to identify the cup phase (lower lows, then higher lows forming a rounded bottom) and subsequent handle formation (consolidation), followed by breakdown. Available indicators can only signal breakdown and volume decline, but cannot validate the prior cup and handle structure.
